data.title: GREEN: Implement security-blue-team reviewer delta and build mapping
data.description:
## Description
Create security blue team reviewer-delta and add tier mapping to build-review-agents.sh.

### Implementation
1. Add security-blue-team to _model_for_tier() returning "opus"
2. Add security-blue-team to _description_for_tier()
3. Create plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-security-blue-team.md with:
   - Tier identity: context-aware security triage agent
   - Triage logic: dismiss (invalid in context), downgrade (real but lower severity), sustain (stands as-is)
   - Full ticket context integration
   - Output schema: per-finding disposition + rationale
   - Consumes red team findings per security-red-team-output.md contract
   - Only sustained/downgraded critical/important findings block

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/build-review-agents.sh
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-security-blue-team.md (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] Agent generated with model: opus
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/build-review-agents.sh && grep -q "model: opus" plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-security-blue-team.md
- [ ] Delta contains triage logic
  Verify: grep -c "dismiss\|downgrade\|sustain" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-security-blue-team.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
